# Savchenko Solutions

> Peer-reviewed, freely-licensed (CC BY-SA 4.0) solutions to O.Y. Savchenko's "Problems in Physics" — one of the hardest physics problem collections in the post-Soviet tradition. 1,500+ human-written, community-reviewed solutions in Russian and English.

## About
- Every solution is written by a person and peer-reviewed; each shows the full worked derivation with LaTeX-rendered mathematics.
- Problems are numbered chapter.section.problem (e.g. 1.1.1, 8.3.7) across 14 chapters: mechanics, thermodynamics & molecular physics, electricity & magnetism, optics, and atomic/nuclear physics.
- Primary audience and language: Russian-speaking physics students; an English translation is also maintained.

## Key pages
- Home (Russian): https://savchenkosolutions.com/ru/
- Home (English): https://savchenkosolutions.com/en/
- Example solution: https://savchenkosolutions.com/ru/1.1.1
- Contributors: https://savchenkosolutions.com/contributors
- Full sitemap: https://savchenkosolutions.com/sitemap.xml
- Source textbook (RU PDF): https://savchenkosolutions.com/savchenko.pdf
- Source textbook (EN PDF): https://savchenkosolutions.com/en/savchenko_en.pdf
